section_miscategorizations.text: Given the family history of melanoma, a thorough evaluation is warranted.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Family history is patient history/subjective context; while the concluding clause about evaluation edges toward plan, the primary content (family history) belongs in the subjective section.

section_miscategorizations.text: Order wrist X-ray to evaluate for carpal tunnel syndrome.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Carpal tunnel syndrome is typically a soft tissue/nerve condition not evaluated by plain X-ray; this is a clinical content issue rather than a section placement error, so there is no true miscategorization, but it may confuse readers about appropriate diagnostics.
